# Scratch Web Agent Entry Point

Scratch Web is an experimental, unofficial web companion for Scratch:
https://github.com/erictli/scratch

Before helping with setup or development, read:

- `SEED.md`
- `docs/AGENT_SETUP.md`
- `docs/SECURITY_AND_PRIVACY.md`
- `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
- `docs/API.md`
- `docs/ROADMAP.md`

For reopened M3/full Scratch parity work, also read:

- `docs/SCRATCH_PARITY_INVENTORY.md`
- `docs/FRONTEND_OPENCODE_BRIEF.md`
- `docs/m3a-screenshots/`

Important boundaries:

- Do not implement frontend/UI/UX directly unless you are the delegated OpenCode
  frontend agent following `docs/FRONTEND_OPENCODE_BRIEF.md`.
- Do not let the old MVP M3 scope override reopened M3 parity scope.
- Do not fake missing backend APIs for frontend parity work; report the API gap.
- Do not expose Scratch Web publicly.
- Do not enable Tailscale Funnel by default.
- Do not log, paste, or transmit private note content unnecessarily.
- Do not install the LaunchAgent for iCloud Drive Scratch folders unless the
  user is deliberately testing `--allow-icloud`; use `scratch-web start` for the
  current login session instead.
- Ask before installing dependencies, using sudo, configuring Tailscale, or
  modifying LaunchAgents.
